title: Access control policy
text: Define and enforce least-privilege access controls for users, services, and automation credentials.

title: Secure configuration baseline
text: Maintain and review secure configuration baselines for infrastructure and application components.

title: Audit logging and monitoring
text: Enable tamper-evident logging for security-relevant events and monitor anomalies continuously.

title: Network segmentation
text: Segment networks by trust boundary and restrict traffic between segments to required flows only.
